Meta.siteDescription: Explore scenario-driven AI demos, reusable architectures, and hyperscaler assets across AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud.

Home.heroTitle: A branded content platform for AI delivery assets
Home.heroSummary: Move from discovery to reuse through scenarios, architectures, insights, and implementation-ready assets with one shared public shell.
Home.valueTitle: Align stakeholders, then move into implementation detail.
Home.valueSummary: The homepage now frames the product, exposes real featured assets, and sends every role into the most relevant content lane before they enter the library.

Assets.emptyClearDescription: Clear the active filters or return to featured assets to see all available content.
Assets.emptyClearTitle: No assets matched the current filters.
Assets.title: Asset Library
Assets.summary: Search reusable demos, architectures, and implementation references.
Assets.emptyDescription: Adjust the search terms or clear filters to see available assets.

AssetDetail.chooseLens: Choose the lens for this asset
AssetDetail.lensSummary: Sales focuses on value framing. Delivery reveals implementation guidance when access is granted.
AssetDetail.signinRequiredDescription: Sign in with an approved role to review runbooks, deployment steps, and delivery notes.
AssetDetail.requestAccessDescription: Request delivery access to review runbooks, deployment steps, and delivery notes.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.description: This page may have moved, or the link is no longer available.
NotFound.descriptionAlt: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

Login.heroTitle: Explore the public content platform, then move into operational workspaces.
Login.heroSummary: Access saved assets, profiles, and admin operations from one identity entry point.
Login.publicDiscoveryDescription: Browse reusable demos, architectures, and scenario-led content before you sign in.
Login.operationalContinuityDescription: Move from discovery into admin workflows without losing route context.
Login.protectedAccessDescription: Keep sensitive governance actions behind authenticated workspaces and 2FA when required.
Login.title: Sign in
Login.passwordStepSummary: Access saved assets, profiles, and admin operations.
Login.totpStepSummary: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator to continue.
Login.adminReturnSummary: You were sent here from the admin workspace and will return to the exact page after sign-in.
Login.returnRoute: Return route: the public library remains your discovery surface for assets, profiles, and reference content.

About.title: A public content layer that helps teams align before they commit to build.
About.summary: The hub connects scenario framing, architecture direction, editorial insight, and community participation so teams can move from curiosity to execution with less ambiguity.

scenarioLedDelivery.title: Scenario-led delivery
scenarioLedDelivery.description: We shape assets around business journeys, operating risks, and measurable outcome moves rather than isolated demos.

reusableArchitecture.title: Reusable architecture
reusableArchitecture.description: Reference patterns accelerate design decisions across orchestration, knowledge, trust, and edge execution.

workingCommunity.title: Working community
workingCommunity.description: Operators, architects, and product teams share methods, proof points, and delivery patterns across sectors.

howUsedItems: Stakeholders browse scenarios to align on business value and workflow change.
Architecture teams use reference patterns to reduce design churn before delivery begins.
Program leaders share insight articles to align controls, ownership, and rollout expectations.
Working groups and labs create a repeatable feedback loop across teams and sectors.
About.startFromSection: Start from the section that fits your need

startWithScenarios.label: Start with scenarios
startWithScenarios.description: Use business journeys when the problem statement is still forming.

startWithArchitecture.label: Start with architecture
startWithArchitecture.description: Use reference views when the delivery model and controls need alignment.

startWithCommunity.label: Start with community
startWithCommunity.description: Use programs and labs when teams need peer exchange and practical review.

goToAssets.label: Go to assets
goToAssets.description: Use the asset library when the team is ready for implementation-oriented exploration.

Footer.productSummary: A unified entry point for scenarios, architectures, insights, and community practices that accelerate AI delivery asset reuse.
Footer.copyright: © 2026 Hyperscaler Asset Hub. All rights reserved.
Footer.aboutHubDescription: Discover scenario-led content, reference architecture thinking, and implementation-ready delivery assets from one branded platform.

ContentLanes.title: Start from what your role needs
ContentLanes.summary: Four content lanes help teams move from business questions to reusable implementation assets.

scenarios.title: Scenarios
scenarios.summary: Start from business journeys and measurable AI outcomes before you enter implementation detail.

architecture.title: Architecture
architecture.summary: Move into trust, orchestration, knowledge, and implementation patterns that scale beyond pilots.

insights.title: Insights
insights.summary: Use short reads to align sponsors and teams on operating-model choices, risks, and tradeoffs.

community.title: Community
community.summary: Connect with working groups, labs, and reusable delivery practices shared by practitioners.

FeaturedAssets.title: Priority reference patterns to reuse
FeaturedAssets.summary: Start with curated architecture assets that connect scenario intent to implementation options.

overview.title: Operations overview
overview.summary: Monitor content health, recent work, and access-control surfaces from one workspace.

createAsset.title: Create asset

manageTemplates.title: Manage templates
manageTemplates.description: Update reusable templates to standardize structure and block-level baselines.

policySimulator.title: Policy simulator

assetDraftsQueue.title: Asset drafts queue
assetDraftsQueue.description: Process assets awaiting publication, complete metadata, and move them toward launch.

templateBaselineRefresh.title: Template baseline refresh
templateBaselineRefresh.description: Ensure new assets inherit standard templates and content block structures by default.

policyReviewWindow.title: Policy review window
policyReviewWindow.description: Coordinate roles and policy pages to reduce access-control change risk.

managedAssets.title: Managed assets
managedAssets.description: Content assets governed through operations and publishing controls.

adminUsers.title: Admin users
adminUsers.description: Accounts and operational identities with admin access.

governanceSurfaces.title: Governance surfaces
governanceSurfaces.description: Admin modules connected to the unified shell and navigation metadata.

governance.label: GOVERNANCE
governance.shellHighlight: Shell, sidebar, topbar, and overview now share one operational frame.
governance.navigationHighlight: Navigation metadata is centralized for overview, assets, templates, and access pages.
governance.routeGuardHighlight: `RouteGuard` remains the only entry point for protected admin routes.

assets.title: Assets
assets.description: Manage discovery, publication, and lifecycle for reusable platform assets.
assets.descriptionShort: Content assets, publishing status, and governance actions.
assets.noAssetsDescription: Get started by creating a new asset.
assets.publishFailed: Publish failed, please complete required fields.
assets.confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete asset "{title}"? This action cannot be undone.
assets.confirmDeleteGeneric: Are you sure you want to delete this asset?
assets.confirmBatchDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected assets? This action cannot be undone.
assets.summary: Manage discovery, publication, and lifecycle for reusable platform assets.
assets.totalAssetsDescription: Content assets governed through operations and publishing controls.

roles.title: Roles
roles.description: Role definitions, responsibility boundaries, and authorization scopes.
roles.descriptionLong: View role definitions, permission sets, and policy bindings. Fields align with known API keys while preserving the raw response for debugging.
roles.overviewDescription: When the API returns an inconsistent schema, the page still shows raw JSON for field mapping debugging.
roles.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the ownership boundary and permission intent for this role.
roles.batchDeleteFailed: Batch delete failed: {count} roles could not be deleted
roles.confirmBatchDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected roles? This action cannot be undone.
roles.confirmDeleteRole: Are you sure you want to delete this role?

users.title: Users
users.description: Account activity, availability, and MFA views.
users.noUsersDescription: Click the "Create user" button above to add the first user.
users.fetchFailed: Failed to fetch user list. Please check your network connection.
users.confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete user "{email}"? This action cannot be undone.
users.confirmDeleteGeneric: Are you sure you want to delete this user?
users.confirmBatchDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected users? This action cannot be undone.
users.batchDeleteFailed: Batch delete failed: {count} users could not be deleted

templates.title: Templates
templates.description: Template library, structural reuse, and content baselines.
templates.descriptionLong: Manage content templates for quickly creating asset content blocks.

policies.title: Policies
policies.description: Access rules, condition combinations, and execution semantics.
policies.descriptionLong: View policy scope, subject ranges, resource constraints, and condition summaries. The raw response is preserved for continued field mapping refinement.
policies.batchDeleteFailed: Batch delete failed: {count} policies could not be deleted
policies.confirmBatchDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected policies? This action cannot be undone.

policyWizard.title: Policy Wizard
policyWizard.description: Create and validate access policies through a guided flow.
policyWizard.descriptionLong: Create access policies step by step: Template → Basics → Permissions → Scope & Review.
policyWizard.blankDescription: Start from scratch with effect, permissions, and scope.
policyWizard.draftSyncNote: Drafts sync across steps; Next/Submit are enabled or disabled based on current step validation.
policyWizard.policyAlreadyExists: Policy name already exists. Please choose a different name.
policyWizard.invalidRoleNames: Contains invalid role names: {names}. Please refresh the role list or correct and retry.
policyWizard.invalidRoleNamesGeneric: Contains invalid role names. Please refresh the role list or correct and retry.
policyWizard.noRolesFromApi: Role API returned no data. You can still enter role_names manually.

matrix.title: Permission Matrix
matrix.description: Joined view of roles and permissions matrix.
matrix.descriptionLong: Aggregate effective permission results by role and policy in real time, with support for resource_type, resource_visibility, and permission search. Select a cell to view matching policy sources.
matrix.rolesDescription: Deduplicated by role name as matrix column headers, directly reflecting the current Admin role set.
matrix.policiesDescription: Resolved policy effect, permission, role scope, and resource context for matrix aggregation.
matrix.selectCellHint: Select a cell to view matching policies

simulator.title: Policy Simulator
simulator.description: Validate authorization requests and replay policy decisions.
simulator.descriptionLong: Test authorization requests against current policies in real time. Adjust inputs to observe how role, resource, and condition combinations resolve to Allow or Deny.
simulator.subject: Subject
simulator.noResult: No result yet. Build a request and run the simulation.
simulator.errorDescription: The simulation could not be completed. Check the request format and try again.

assetEditor.title: Asset Editor
assetEditor.description: Edit asset metadata, content blocks, sales, and delivery information.
